name: Eloïse
aboutYou: Meet the human version of a curious squirrel on espresso: a girl who asks so many questions that even Google would need a snack break. She's the kind of kid who doesn't just want to know what happens, but why, how, and "what if we tried it upside down?"

With a brain that runs faster than her sneakers (and trust me, those sneakers move), she solves problems like it's a casual hobby—right between scoring goals, climbing things she probably shouldn't, and inventing new games that somehow include rules only she fully understands.
Her smile? Permanently switched on. Rain, homework, Monday mornings—it doesn't matter. She beams like she's got a secret stash of sunshine in her pocket and she's not afraid to use it.

And just when you think she's all energy and clever comebacks, she'll surprise you by being incredibly helpful—whether it's lending a hand, cheering someone up, or organizing things better than most adults.

Basically, she's a one-girl combination of a mini scientist, a motivational coach, and a whirlwind of positivity. In short: if curiosity had a captain, intelligence had a mascot, and kindness had a spokesperson… they'd all be fighting over her.
